caption: A series of repeating shots shows a group of individuals in an outdoor urban setting, each focused on their mobile devices. A blonde woman in a yellow top and another woman in a beige lace top are seen looking down at their phones. A man wearing a denim jacket over a white t-shirt with headphones around his neck smiles while holding a phone and a coffee cup. Another man in a dark jacket is also visible, typing on his smartphone. Across the center of the scenes, bold yellow and white text overlays the images, reading "JOIN AN' INTERACTIVE TRADING COMMUNITY". The sequence consists of these same shots repeated in a loop, maintaining the same clothing, objects, and expressions across the frames, creating a rhythmic visual pattern of people engaging with their handheld technology.
